zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Waller於1535年出生在英國素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯時，她的父親Nicholas Waller26歲，母親Susan Chapman21歲。她於1555年9月30日與Thomas Page在英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Waller于1535年出生在英国素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯时，她的父亲Nicholas Waller26岁，母亲Susan Chapman21岁。她于1555年9月30日与Thomas Page在英国英格兰素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯。

nameMeanings.name: Waller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English waler, waliere, walour, waller ‘builder of walls, mason’.
English: in Sussex, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent wall.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English waller, a derivative of Middle English walle, Old English wælle, wælle. It is a West Midlands dialect form of Weller .

variants.name: Weller
meanings: English (Surrey, Sussex, and Kent): topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English weller, willer, an agent derivative of Middle English welle (in southern England) and wille (in south western England), from Old English wella, well(e), wiella, wielle, willa, wyll(a), wylle. This type of name, a topographic term + -er, is particularly typical of Sussex and its neigbouring counties.
English: occupational name for someone who casts metal or who boils salt, from Middle English weller, willer, a derivative with -er of Old English wellan, wiellan ‘to boil’. Compare 5 below.
North German: variant of   Welle  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Waller was born in 1535, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, her father, Nicholas Waller, was 26 and her mother, Susan Chapman, was 21. She married Thomas Page on 30 September 1555, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She was buried in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Waller est née en 1535, à Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Waller, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Susan Chapman, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Page le 30 septembre 1555, à Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elleenterrée à Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Waller 1535 in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Waller 26 und ihre Mutter Susan Chapman 21. Sie hat am 30. September 1555 in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Thomas Page geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie wurde in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Waller è nata il nel 1535 nel Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Nicholas Waller, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Susan Chapman, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Page il 30 settembre 1555, nel Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Fu sepolta a Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Wallerが1535年にイギリススフォルクワルシャム ル ウィロウズで生まれた時，父Nicholas Wallerは26歳，母Susan Chapmanは21歳であった。1555年9月30日にイギリスイギリススフォルクワルシャム ル ウィロウズでThomas Pageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリススフォルクワルシャム ル ウィロウズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Waller(이)가 1535년 영국 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Waller(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susan Chapman(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1555년 9월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 Thomas Page(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Waller nasceu em 1535, em Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Waller, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Susan Chapman, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Page em 30 de setembro de 1555, em Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Waller родилась в 1535 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Waller было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Susan Chapman, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Page 30 сентября 1555 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Waller nació en 1535, en Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Waller, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Susan Chapman, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas Page el 30 de septiembre de 1555, en Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Fue sepultada en Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
